title: Peppery Chewy Moroccan Date Stir-fry
description: This diabetic-friendly Moroccan date stir-fry combines chewy dates with a peppery kick from cayenne pepper, creating a delicious weeknight dish that's easy to prepare and spiced up with vanilla bean paste.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the cayenne pepper and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
Stir in the sliced dates and vanilla bean paste. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the dates start to soften and release their juices, about 5 minutes.
Add the finely chopped onion and continue to stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the onions are translucent and fragrant.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
